'''ây-th-ch-s''' ('''kayathchesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulse|pulse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-th-ch-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulse|pulse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-th-ch-s
|-
! Lemma
| kayathchesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyathchesoko|thiyathchesoko]] || [[word:jiyathchesoko|jiyathchesoko]] || [[word:shiyathchesoko|shiyathchesoko]] || [[word:kiyathchesoko|kiyathchesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyathchesoko|thuthuyathchesoko]] || [[word:jujuyathchesoko|jujuyathchesoko]] || [[word:shushuyathchesoko|shushuyathchesoko]] || [[word:kukuyathchesoko|kukuyathchesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyathchesoko|thoyathchesoko]] || [[word:joyathchesoko|joyathchesoko]] || [[word:shoyathchesoko|shoyathchesoko]] || [[word:koyathchesoko|koyathchesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyathchesoko|thĂŠyathchesoko]] || [[word:jĂŠyathchesoko|jĂŠyathchesoko]] || [[word:shĂŠyathchesoko|shĂŠyathchesoko]] || [[word:kĂŠyathchesoko|kĂŠyathchesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayathchesoko|thayathchesoko]] || [[word:jayathchesoko|jayathchesoko]] || [[word:shayathchesoko|shayathchesoko]] || [[word:kayathchesoko|kayathchesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
